_description: Machine-readable capability registry of MirrorBot assets verified reusable by a foreign bot/agent in another silo. MirrorBot's strategy core has no measured edge and is being scrapped; this indexes the infrastructure, data, tools, patterns, and external avenues that survive the scrap. Assets marked status=usable_now work as-is today. All verdicts come from two read-only multi-agent stress-test workflows with adversarial verification (2026-07-01); see MB_SALVAGE_MANIFEST.md for the narrative + triangulation.

discovery.how_a_foreign_silo_finds_this: This file lives at repo root on master; sibling git worktrees (eb/main, wb/main) share the object store and any cloud silo pulling origin (github.com/swatson124455/polymarket-ai-v2) inherits it. Convention: look for SALVAGE_PACKAGE.json at repo root, or grep repos for package id 'mirrorbot-salvage'.
discovery.shared_db: All bots share one Postgres (db 'polymarket'). Data-table assets below are queryable from any silo connected to it.
discovery.shared_code: base_engine/** and scripts/** are shared infra already present in every silo derived from master — a consumer imports/invokes them in place, no copy needed. bots/** files are MB-local (die with the scrap); their reusable logic must be copy-and-repointed (see category=pattern).

how_to_consume.infra_module: Import in place from the shared base_engine package. Already on every silo's path.
how_to_consume.data_table: Connect to the shared 'polymarket' Postgres and query. Honor the cleaning_recipe/caveats before training on it.
how_to_consume.tool: Run on the VPS as: cd /opt/polymarket-ai-v2 && sudo -u polymarket env PYTHONPATH=/opt/polymarket-ai-v2 venv/bin/python scripts/<tool> <args>
how_to_consume.pattern: The file dies with the MB scrap; copy the named function/lines into your bot and re-point self.base_engine. NOT importable as-is (these are methods on MirrorBot).
how_to_consume.avenue: External endpoint/contract a consumer depends on; honor the silent_break risk.
how_to_consume.signal_research: Shared base_engine/learning module; import in place. Calibrators/monitors, NOT edge sources.

provenance.method: 2 read-only multi-agent stress-test workflows (wf_aef66e8b-75e, wf_3c453b00-442) + serial canonical-tool runs, each claim triangulated >=2 sources + adversarially verified
provenance.rules: Trading-state $/win-rate omitted unless bot_pnl.py-sourced; LIVE outcomes from reconcile_live_onchain.py (canonical); table sizes are PG metadata; config is file:line.
provenance.unverified: Live POLYGON_RPC/RELAYER/CANARY env values; Phase-4b live convergence; live V2 matched-order response shape.

assets.does: CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN breaker + Bug-17 escalation + WI-7 permanent-halt; CB-neutral-on-bad-order set (S245) stops 400-storms tripping the breaker
assets.caveats: escalation is in-process (resets on restart, by design)

assets.does: Kelly sizing f*=(p*b-q)/b with fraction/calibration/drawdown/conformal dampeners + per-bet/phase/daily caps; wallet-derived bankroll (opt-in, stale-refuses-to-size)
assets.caveats: MB's flat-$1 is a caller/config state, NOT a defect in this module; Kelly math is correct

assets.does: Global Polymarket trade firehose (wss://ws-live-data.polymarket.com, topic activity/trades); 5s ping, 25s recv-timeout, exp-backoff reconnect, orphan-task cancel
assets.caveats: endpoint config-driven (repointable via env); undocumented socket schema is the silent-break risk (see avenue.rtds)
assets.verified_by: code + live journalctl (feed flowing, reconnect exercised in-vivo)

assets.does: Resolution-backfill into trade_events; side-agnostic RESOLUTION dedup
assets.caveats: fix 08c0b06 present + git-confirmed; live convergence not behaviorally re-run

assets.does: S249 wedge defense: WATCHDOG=1 ping, stale-heartbeat SELECT via get_raw_session (semaphore-bypass), os._exit(1) force-restart past 2x stale; kill-switch 30s TTL cache fail-safe-True
assets.caveats: VALIDATED firing in production 2026-07-01; catches full-loop freeze but not scan-only stall while watchdog task still pings; kill_switch.py:13 TTL is 30s (docstrings wrongly say 5s)

assets.does: DB-atomic slot reservation (INSERT ON CONFLICT), single trade_events writer, stale-reservation reaper
assets.caveats: delete dead method can_take_position (0 callers; the real contention guard is reserve_position ON CONFLICT)

assets.does: CLOB submit (V2 sig_type=3 deposit-wallet), YES/NO->BUY translation, balance/allowance cache, FOK/GTC
assets.caveats: USABLE for paper (records real VWAP fill). LIVE GTC returns the SUBMITTED price not the fill (clob_adapter.py:146) -> cost-basis blind; latent, bites only on flip to live GTC. Fix = capture matched fill into cost basis before confirm_position

assets.consume: SELECT ... FROM orderbook_snapshots WHERE token_id=... AND ts<=<signal_time> ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
assets.does: Full L2 book history; ~37.7M rows; covers the entire mirror_rejected_signals window -> point-in-time fill-replay backtest feasible
assets.caveats: the single best rebuild asset
assets.verified_by: PG reltuples + schema + id-extreme date range

assets.consume: SELECT trader_address,market_id,side,price,resolution,rejection_stage,metadata,event_time FROM mirror_rejected_signals WHERE rejection_stage='gate' AND resolution IS NOT NULL
assets.does: Whale signal -> outcome labels; ~16.4M rows (id seq to 17.5M), 2026-04-22..07-01; labels temporally-guarded (no look-ahead)
cleaning_recipe: filter rejection_stage='gate' for the feature vector (gate_score/kelly_prob)
apply stale-price window (pre-2026-06-13 b3c26f7) ONLY to gate-stage rows; pre_gate prices are the whale fill, unaffected
assets.caveats: ~27-42x pseudo-replication; feature vector only on gate-stage rows which are ~0.7% labeled -> the trainable-AND-feature-rich set is low hundreds/day, NOT millions
assets.verified_by: PG metadata + 20-row+50k samples + backfill temporal-guard test

assets.does: Ranked smart-money stream; Feb17..Jul01; all key cols populated incl. smart_money_rank
assets.caveats: THIN (~68 rows/day) -> forward-collect for depth

assets.does: Intended-vs-actual execution mechanics + L2 book snapshot at signal; 13,855 rows (5,823 executed)
assets.caveats: USABLE for execution-haircut measurement ONLY. shadow_pnl is 100% NULL for MB -> NOT usable for P&L. intended-vs-actual only ~16% coverage

assets.does: Live-outcome record (reconcile against on-chain for truth)
assets.caveats: row-composition inventory: predominantly paper-mode, small live partition. side='SELL' column-integrity corruption (recoverable via token_id -> the true YES/NO is in the outcome token). Use reconcile_live_onchain.py for live truth, NOT raw rows

assets.does: raw whale trade stream
assets.caveats: DEAD SNAPSHOT frozen 2026-03-18..19 (3.5mo stale); no smart_money_rank. Use whale_movements or mirror_rejected_signals instead

assets.does: CANONICAL trading-state P&L/win-rate/trade-counts (the ONLY sanctioned source for trading-state numbers)
assets.caveats: the :651 block-5b f-string bug is WeatherBot-gated; MB/other paths unaffected

assets.does: CANONICAL for LIVE positions: CTF balanceOf + CLOB resolution per position
assets.caveats: on-chain is ground truth for live; DB/bot_pnl are derived

assets.does: Bootstrap edge + P(edge>0) gate; contamination filter == bot_pnl.py
assets.caveats: reads trade_events (paper-dominated for MB)

assets.does: Shadow-fill counterfactual + execution-haircut mechanics
assets.caveats: carries its own bias warning; DO NOT use its figures to justify cap increases

assets.does: Standalone capital recovery: reconcile->redeem (incl. neg-risk via NegRiskAdapter)->convert->retrade
assets.caveats: default dry-run; --execute moves real money (operator-gated); silently recovers $0 if POLYGON_RPC key dies (no fallback)

assets.does: shadow-fill analysis
assets.caveats: BROKEN: db.initialize() should be db.init() (1-word fix); also P&L blocks are dead (shadow_pnl NULL for MB)

assets.does: slippage report
assets.caveats: BROKEN: binds a str cutoff to a TIMESTAMP column (asyncpg won't coerce); needs datetime parse

assets.does: per-source-wallet breakdown
assets.caveats: BROKEN: queries non-existent elite_traders table; also a per-trader join over-attributes market P&L to every trader in the market

assets.does: Rank Polymarket leaderboard traders by ROI/profit-factor with per-category quotas + inactivity decay; O(1) address-set lookup; capped-OrderedDict tx dedup
assets.caveats: EXTRACT-CLEAN (23 tests run with db=None). Bugs to fix on copy: profit_factor=inf on zero-loss traders (:347); ROI is OVERALL not per-category

assets.does: 3-tier fresh-price resolver: live CLOB midpoint -> DB price if age<=max -> (None,stale)
assets.caveats: EXTRACT-CLEAN (test confirms zero MB-state). Returns midpoint, not tradeable ask

assets.does: On-chain CTF-balance truth for phantom/partial detection; 0.01-token dust epsilon
assets.caveats: EXTRACT-CLEAN. PRESERVE the asymmetric design: guard fails OPEN (don't make it worse), phantom-confirm fails CLOSED (it destroys a position)

assets.consume: copy the mechanisms: capped-OrderedDict same-side dedup, monotonic-TTL cooldown dict, 2-layer in-memory+historical guard, market-maker detector
assets.does: Position/entry dedup + liquidity-provider detection (same trader both sides in 24h)
dependencies: settings only, in-memory (no DB hot path)
assets.caveats: EXTRACT the MECHANISMS; DISCARD the 'one-bet-per-market' policy (that is MB's product rule, not universal)
assets.verified_by: code + CLAUDE.md RULE TWO + S244 live-observed

assets.does: O(n log n) entry->exit pairing within 1h causal window; >=3 round-trips flags a wash trader 48h
assets.caveats: sound (3 prior bug-fixes in header, causal window verified)

assets.consume: reference the net-counter PATTERN (rebuild counters from SUM(ENTRY)-SUM(EXIT), never a stored scalar); rewrite SQL for your schema
assets.does: Startup state restoration (CLAUDE.md net-counter tier reference impl)
assets.caveats: EXTRACT-WITH-REWORK + carries a latent bug: _state_restored=True set at :496 BEFORE the _entered_market_sides rebuild (:562-592) -> silent partial-restore; KEEP the is_paper mode-filter

assets.does: RTDS copy dispatch
assets.caveats: secretly bot-coupled; but the sub-patterns (side-resolution, wash-detector, RTDS price cache) are separately clean

assets.does: global trade firehose, no auth
assets.silent_break: undocumented Polymarket socket schema (payload/proxyWallet) — partial rename yields connected-but-empty; bot watchdog keys on _events_dispatched (catches total stall, not partial rename)

assets.does: ROI/PNL-ranked wallet discovery, no auth
assets.silent_break: path/field rename -> watchlist_size->0 (logged, good detectability). rank arrives as string; pnl/vol are Polymarket-reported not ground-truth edge
assets.verified_by: code + live HTTP 200 shape-match + live log

assets.does: gasless redeem/convert/retrade; neg-risk 2-arg redeem vs vanilla 4-arg

assets.verified_by: code + 2 in-repo refs + S247 executed tx

assets.does: Same-entity/coordinated wallet detection (co-trading, size-correlation, activity pairing) via connected components — label-free
assets.caveats: USE the clustering/dedup graph (usable as-is). DO NOT use get_combined_rank — it is a size-only placeholder, NOT profitability; a consumer must implement profit-factor ranking. Shared (used by ensemble_bot), survives scrap

assets.does: Inductive Venn-ABERS calibrated probability INTERVALS (p0,p1) via isotonic regression
assets.caveats: a CALIBRATOR, not an edge source (calibrates a score you already have; cannot create edge). Not currently wired into any live bot

assets.does: ADWIN-U concept-drift monitor on realized_edge stream (tells you WHEN edge decays)
assets.caveats: a MONITOR/safety asset, not a signal

assets.does: periodic retrain + degradation-triggered force-retrain + meta-learner tuning + canary auto-transition
assets.caveats: USABLE-WITH-FIX: heavy coupling (not a standalone lift). FOOTGUN: _canary_auto_transition auto-advances paper->live capital on a Brier window, CANARY_AUTO_ADVANCE default True — NEUTRALIZE before reuse

assets.does: ~55 tuning knobs (gating, sizing, filters, NO-side dampeners, copy tiers)
assets.caveats: code defaults (max_bet_usd=300, whale gate $100) diverge from MB runtime env (1, $5) — a consumer inheriting the defaults file gets the code values; verify env before trusting either

assets.does: gate_score/kelly_prob whale-copy scoring + flat sizing + multi-factor confidence
assets.caveats: DO NOT REUSE — no measured edge (this audit: signal indistinguishable from zero; no +EV wallet subset; confidence non-monotonic). This IS the part being scrapped
